summary: The meeting focused on reviewing current Meeting Notes Assistant progress, refining pilot outreach and positioning, and reviewing current technical risks

summary_slots.purpose: The meeting focused on reviewing current Meeting Notes Assistant progress, refining pilot outreach and positioning, and reviewing current technical risks
risks: Pricing confirmation may delay the client follow-up
Moving users between different domains may create a trust gap during signup or checkout
next_steps: Create two versions of LinkedIn post, one founder style, and one product style.

key_points: Do we want the start early access button to go directly to the pricing page, or to the Acjen AI landing page first?
Action item recall, decisions, risks, open questions, chunk evidence, deduplication, and vague action cleanup
Discussion should not become a decision unless someone says we agreed, decision confirmed, approved
The landing page and app are currently on different domains, so users may feel a small trust gap if they move from Acjen AI to the versatile pricing page
Maya says, Priya, please also create two versions of LinkedIn post, one founder style, and one product style
The purpose is to confirm what we can launch this week, what should stay out of scope, and what we need to improve for 30 to 60-minute meeting recall without lacking the social media launch
decisions: Confirmed decisions, control early access, Acjen AI as main URL, quality branch limited to 30 to 60-minute recall, preserve evidence internally first, do not pay for every directory, social copy does not lead with limits, fewer matter action items, practical risk only, and resolved open questions only, continue on chiven if one platform blocks us
Decision confirmed for directories, use Acjen AI as the main product to RL

decision_objects.text: Confirmed decisions, control early access, Acjen AI as main URL, quality branch limited to 30 to 60-minute recall, preserve evidence internally first, do not pay for every directory, social copy does not lead with limits, fewer matter action items, practical risk only, and resolved open questions only, continue on chiven if one platform blocks us
Decision confirmed for directories, use Acjen AI as the main product to RL
